name: Bean Burritos with Tvp®
recipeIngredient: 7/8 cup Water, or white grape juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat water or juice to boiling and pour over TVP® in a heatproof bowl. Allow to sit for 10 minutes until water is absorbed.
2. Add beans with juice to TVP®.
3. Saute onions in a little water or juice until soft.
4. Lay out tortillas flat, and divide bean-TVP® mixture evenly among the 8 tortillas.
5. Fold the tortilla up from the bottom, down from the top, and then fold the two ends to the middle.
6. Pin the burritos closed with a toothpick.
7. Spray a cookie sheet with cooking spray, place the "envelopes" on the cookie sheet, and spray them again.
8. Place in a 350 degree oven for 10-15 minutes until crisp and slightly browned.
9. Remove toothpicks when baked; they will stay in shape.
10. Use what you need, and freeze the rest in plastic freezer bags.
11. When ready to serve, heat in oven or microwave and top with tomatoes, onions (guacamole), black olives, and picante sauce as desired.
